---
name: New moratorium
about: Tell us about a moratorium we're missing
title: "[NEW] State, Jurisdiction"
labels: new-moratorium
---

**State and jurisdiction:**
(e.g., Michigan — Pittsfield Township)

**Date adopted:**
(e.g., 2025-11-20)

**Duration:**
(e.g., 6 months)

**Sectors covered:**
(data center, crypto mining, BESS, solar, wind, etc.)

**Source link or document:**
(URL of meeting minutes, ordinance PDF, news article, or other primary source — at least one is required)

**Anything else we should know:**
(extensions, replacement ordinance, related projects, etc.)

---
Thanks for contributing! We add verified moratoria to the dataset on every release. We'll review your submission, confirm it against primary sources, and credit you in the changelog if you'd like.
